results.rendered_html:
duvoyu adj. ehrend (vgl. duvasyu)ḥ sa tu śrudhi śrutyā yo duvoyurdyaurna bhūmābhi rāyo aryaḥ  ṚV. 6,36,5 . duvoyu adv.
1〉 verehrend, reverenter: ādityānyāmyaditiṃ duvoyu 51,4 .
— 2〉 aus Anerkennung, zum Lohn (?): [Page3-0698] (suṣupuḥ) ṣaṣṭirvīrāso adhi ṣaḍduvoyu viśvedindrasya vīryā kṛtāni 7,18,14 . aviṣṭanā paijavanasya ketuṃ dūṇāśaṃ kṣatramajaraṃ duvoyu 25.
